identity.name: Elegant Pizzeria
identity.description: A seamless blend of Italian tradition and modern speed. The interface feels like a candlelit dinner: warm, intimate, and focused on the food.

usage.headings: Use Playfair Display for all Section Titles and Product Names to evoke elegance.
usage.body: Use Manrope for descriptions, prices, and UI elements for maximum legibility.
usage.price: Use Manrope font-bold text-lg for prices.

primary.description: Rosewood Red - Deep, wine-like red for primary actions and brand presence.

secondary.description: Warm Stone - Off-white paper texture for light mode backgrounds.

accent.description: Gold Leaf - For premium tags, selected states, and highlights.

image_style.overlay: Use a subtle black gradient overlay on hero images to ensure text readability.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-medium shadow-lg transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-white rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium transition-all

cards.product: bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 hover:shadow-card_hover transition-shadow group cursor-pointer
cards.admin: bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-lg border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 p-6

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-stone-100 p-4 flex justify-around items-center z-50
navigation.admin_sidebar: w-64 bg-stone-900 text-stone-300 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 p-4 border-r border-stone-800

customer_app.structure: Mobile-first, single column stream. Categories are sticky on scroll or accessible via bottom nav.
customer_app.hero: Full-width immersive image with gradient overlay. Restaurant name in large Serif font.
customer_app.product_list: List view with large thumbnails on mobile, Grid view (3-col) on desktop.
customer_app.cart_modal: Slide-over drawer from right. Clean summary with clear 'Checkout' CTA.

admin_dashboard.kitchen_display: Dark mode MANDATORY. High contrast cards. 3-4 columns grid. Color-coded headers for time elapsed.
admin_dashboard.tables_view: Grid of tables with status indicators (Empty, Occupied, Bill Requested).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast ratio of 4.5:1. Use 'text-stone-900' on 'bg-stone-50' for body.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44px for all mobile interactive elements.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring with 'ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2' on keyboard navigation.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless specified (use solid warm neutrals or dark grays).
Use 'Playfair Display' ONLY for headings. Use 'Manrope' for everything else.
Avoid generic 'blue' for links/buttons. Use Brand Red or Gold.
Mobile images must be optimized and not take up more than 40% of the screen height in list views.
All prices should be formatted as '€ 12.00'.
Admin KDS (Kitchen Display System) MUST be high-contrast Dark Mode.
